name: Global Ship Lease Inc. Depository Shares Representing 1/100th Perpetual Preferred Series B% (Marshall Island)
summary: Global Ship Lease Inc. is a containership owner, chartering its vessels to container shipping companies under fixed-rate time charters. The company's business model focuses on owning and operating a fleet of mid-sized containerships, generating revenue through long-term charter agreements. Global Ship Lease is headquartered in Marshall Islands.
